name: Bacopa
summary: Bacopa monnieri lean herb row for high-speed phytochemical ingestion.
description: Bacopa monnieri lean herb row for high-speed phytochemical ingestion.
safetyNotes: Generally not associated with major safety issues in reviewed trials, but GI side effects, thyroid/hyperthyroidism cautions, and medication interactions require review.

claimMap.claim: Bacopa may provide modest memory/learning support, but clinical evidence is limited and not consistently significant across the same cognitive tests.
claimMap.notes: Bacopa may provide modest memory/learning support, but clinical evidence is limited and not consistently significant across the same cognitive tests.

dosage: Dose varies by standardized extract and bacoside content; do not publish a universal dose without extract standardization. | Bacopa monnieri extracts/standardized bacoside products; combinations should not be credited solely to bacopa.
